new_classes.label_en: Tokaj wine in containers > 2 L and ≤ 10 L (subheading 2204 22 33)
new_classes.label_de: Tokajer Wein in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von mehr als 2 L bis einschließlich 10 L (Unterposition 2204 22 33)
new_classes.definition_en: Wine bearing the Protected Designation of Origin 'Tokaj', presented in containers with a nominal liquid volume greater than 2 litres and not exceeding 10 litres, classified under CN subheading 2204 22 33. The Tokaj PDO is governed by additional note 4(B)(b) to Chapter 22 of the CN.

coverage_explanation: The primary distinguishing criteria are captured: (1) Tokaj PDO quality (via TokajPDOQuality restriction), (2) container volume > 2 L and ≤ 10 L (via decimalRange restrictions on liquidVolumeInLitres and LargeContainer part restriction), and (3) sibling disjointness with the small-container Tokaj subheading 22042123. A coverage deduction applies because additional note 4(B)(b) to Chapter 22 — which specifies the precise legal definition and production/origin conditions for Tokaj PDO wines — is referenced in the legal text but its substantive content is not available in the provided notes, so the detailed PDO criteria (e.g. specific grape varieties, geographic delimitation, minimum sugar/extract levels) cannot be fully axiomatised. The complement restriction placed on TokajWine22042123 is intended to express disjointness between the medium-container and small-container Tokaj subheadings but uses an indirect pattern; a formal owl:disjointWith would be stronger but is approximated here within the restrictions array. The TokajPDOQuality class already exists in the running TBox, avoiding duplication.
